title: Bug: corvee show does not resolve item aliases
description: Reproduce: corvee add story --parent X --title T → corvee move (the new story) <new-parent> → corvee show <original-id>. Expected: exit 0, returns canonical item (the alias-bearing record). Actual: exit 3 ErrNotFound. Root cause: Store.Get(id) looks up canonical ID only; never scans items[].aliases[] on miss. domain.Item.Aliases (item.go:60) is populated by move/rename but never read for lookup. Fix scope: either (a) fsstore scans aliases on Get-miss, or (b) Show usecase falls back to an alias index lookup. Prefer (a) so every lookup path benefits (List filter by ID, Update, etc.).
acceptance_criteria: corvee show <alias-id> returns the canonical item (exit 0)
Alias resolution covers move and rename outputs
Lookup remains O(items) worst case; documented if so

journal.note: Fixed in this branch — see resolve.go + Show usecase.
